body: this release includes PR #3695 that ensures backwards compatibility with versions 0.91.x and adds tests that were missing in #3695
title: (0.91.8) bug fix release

body:
As discussed in #3676, this PR attempts to add methods to `mask_immersed_field!` for `BinaryOperations` so they can be passed as auxiliary fields.

This works for binary operations which combine fields or a field and a number. To make + and - work I have to set the value to -/+ the number value for the field.

![mask_immersed](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/55f31022-5a7c-47df-9bca-32c5079880c8)
title: Adds methods to `mask_immersed_field!` for `BinaryOperations`
